falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme volatility/panic, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a market breakdown rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5500 with a close above 5550
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the 85% similarity to the bottom_2024_aug pattern, which historically failed to break key resistance levels during consolidation phases.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the Nasdaq 100 exceeds 20 billion dollars in a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a confirmed breakout/panic move, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by proving a clear directional shift.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
